title: Antonym Ants
short_description: Hungry word-ants march toward the picnic! Feed each one the opposite (or the same-meaning) word before it arrives, and grow your vocabulary.
description: The ants are marching to the picnic and they only eat the right word. Read the task — 'find the OPPOSITE of hot' or 'find the SAME as happy' — then tap the word that fits before the ant reaches the basket. It's a tasty way to build vocabulary: antonyms and synonyms, shades of meaning, and the difference between words that clash and words that match. Grade bands ramp from easy everyday opposites, to a mix of synonyms and antonyms, to richer, more grown-up vocabulary. Quick, correct feeding and streaks earn bonus points. A free online synonyms, antonyms and vocabulary language game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Mouse / tap the word that is the opposite (or same) as the target.
